　　Oy Vey My Son is Gay is a new romantic comedy featuring a Jewish family who struggles coming to terms with their sons non-Jewish and gay boyfriend, and the other families difficulty accepting their own son, both families hide it, but in the end when the couple adopts a child and it makes headline news, they come to defend the couple and realize how much they love them.Best of ...
